title: Adler University - Canada.ca
content:
You are eligible for a post-graduation work permit (PGWP) if you complete one of the degrees below and you meet all other PGWP criteria :
- Master of Arts in Counselling Psychology
- Master of Arts in Industrial and Organizational Psychology
- Master of Counselling Psychology
- Master of Counselling Psychology: Art Therapy
- Master of Industrial and Organizational Psychology
- Master of Public Policy and Administration
- Doctor of Psychology in Clinical Psychology
- Master of Applied Psychology
- Master of Psychology – Health & Wellness
You are not eligible if you complete any other program at this school.
